visa_types.name: Resident permit types
visa_types.documents_required:
There is a wide variety of application forms. The applicant is responsible for selecting the form and submitting the documents requested in it. Visit the Danish Migration Service (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB) to read the information on each type of application and its requirements
If you have already filled out your application form and have already made the online payment by obtaining your Case Order ID from the Danish Migration Service, you can now request an appointment at VFS.
If you applied with ONLINE application form you must submit in VFS:
- Online payment receipt with Case Order Id
- Application voucher with Online form
- Printed payment receipt of the Danish embassy fee using this link
 
https://dys.um.dk/permit/ (https://dys.um.dk/permit/)
- Original passport with at least three months of validity after the end of your residence period
- Color copies of the entire passport including the cover (cartola or tapas)
If you applied with a printable application form (which you can fill out by hand) you must submit in VFS:
- Online payment receipt with Case Order Id
- Completed and signed application form
- Printed payment receipt of the Danish embassy fee using this link
 
https://dys.um.dk/permit/ (https://dys.um.dk/permit/)
- Support documents indicated on your application form (check which are in the form's check list)
- Original passport with at least three months of validity after the end of your residence period
- Color copies of the entire passport including the cover (cartola or tapas)
- Payment of Consular fees, service fee and courier to Bogota
Links of interest:
- Permiso de residencia como Au Pair (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/News-Front-Page/2017/12/New-rates-2018-au-pair)
- Student resident permit (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Study/Higher-education)
- Permiso de residencia de trabajo (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Work)
- Permiso de residencia por reunificación familiar (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Family)
- Work residence permit (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Work)
visa_types.overview:
Consular Fee

[Table:Resident permit types]
*Service fee above need to be paid in cash at the office on the date of your appointment.
Please note Applicants applying in La Paz need to pay mandatory courier charges which is Euro 95 (USD 108) it includes one-way courier charges pertaining to the transfer of visa applications from Bogota back to La Paz.
visa_types.full_text:
## Consular Fee

[Table:Resident permit types]
*Service fee above need to be paid in cash at the office on the date of your appointment.
Please note Applicants applying in La Paz need to pay mandatory courier charges which is Euro 95 (USD 108) it includes one-way courier charges pertaining to the transfer of visa applications from Bogota back to La Paz.

## Documents Required
There is a wide variety of application forms. The applicant is responsible for selecting the form and submitting the documents requested in it. Visit the Danish Migration Service (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB) to read the information on each type of application and its requirements
If you have already filled out your application form and have already made the online payment by obtaining your Case Order ID from the Danish Migration Service, you can now request an appointment at VFS.
If you applied with ONLINE application form you must submit in VFS:
- Online payment receipt with Case Order Id
- Application voucher with Online form
- Printed payment receipt of the Danish embassy fee using this link
 
https://dys.um.dk/permit/ (https://dys.um.dk/permit/)
- Original passport with at least three months of validity after the end of your residence period
- Color copies of the entire passport including the cover (cartola or tapas)
If you applied with a printable application form (which you can fill out by hand) you must submit in VFS:
- Online payment receipt with Case Order Id
- Completed and signed application form
- Printed payment receipt of the Danish embassy fee using this link
 
https://dys.um.dk/permit/ (https://dys.um.dk/permit/)
- Support documents indicated on your application form (check which are in the form's check list)
- Original passport with at least three months of validity after the end of your residence period
- Color copies of the entire passport including the cover (cartola or tapas)
- Payment of Consular fees, service fee and courier to Bogota
Links of interest:
- Permiso de residencia como Au Pair (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/News-Front-Page/2017/12/New-rates-2018-au-pair)
- Student resident permit (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Study/Higher-education)
- Permiso de residencia de trabajo (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Work)
- Permiso de residencia por reunificación familiar (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Family)
- Work residence permit (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Work)

## Processing Times
When the embassy received the decision on your application from the Danish Migration services, the decision will be sent to VFS. We will contact you to coordinate the collection of your decision and your passport. If you have requested the Courier service to your home, we will proceed with said shipment.
Processing times will depend on your type of visa, you can check the times here:
- Process times for SIRI - Danish Agency for International Recruitment and Integration (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/Words-and-concepts/SIRI/Case-processing-times-in-SIRI/?anchor=71F61776C825468FB501A8B522130C03&callbackItem=C07AF3AA5B95479DA8D0DC103B07FE8B&callbackAnchor=970289DCAFC548018D223277842C5606)
- Processing times for DIS - Danish Immigration Service (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/Words-and-concepts/US/Diverse-US/Application-processing-times-in-the-Danish-Immigration-Service)
- Processing of data in relation to your application (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/denmark/bolivia/english/pdf/processing-of-data-in-relation-to-your-application.pdf)
